issue_summary: 仅报告 900 °C 生长条件，不能据此建立温度窗口或作者最优温度。
notes: 避免把单一生长温度误解为适用温区或最优条件。

issue_summary: Table 1 的 purity/carbon yield 来自 TGA 碳含量，不等同于应用级纯化产品纯度。
notes: 防止把不同定义的纯度或碳含量指标直接比较。

issue_summary: CNT 长度和残留金属未单独定量。
notes: 这两项缺口会限制形貌比较、纯化负担判断和下游适用性评估。

issue_summary: 压力、甲烷转化率、碳效率、催化剂寿命和连续运行时间未报告。
notes: 这些缺失项直接限制物料效率、催化剂稳定性和连续化可行性判断。

issue_summary: The comparison changes catalyst precursor decomposition atmosphere, not CNT growth temperature. Only 900 °C growth was reported, so no growth-temperature window or temperature effect can be assigned.
notes: Prevents the three catalyst-preparation conditions from being misread as a CNT growth-temperature study.

issue_summary: The reported 43%, 85% and 82% values are TGA carbon contents of as-synthesized products, not purified application-grade CNT purity or separately measured residual-metal content.
notes: Prevents incompatible purity metrics from being compared as equivalent values.
